hooks.prompt: Check if the assistant has already presented a TODO list and received explicit user approval before this file write/edit. Look at the conversation history. If a TODO was shown AND the user approved (said ok, yes, làm đi, proceed, go ahead, done, confirm, comfirk, or similar), output {"decision": "allow"}. If no TODO was shown or user has not approved yet, output {"decision": "block", "reason": "Cần present TODO list và chờ user approve trước khi implement."}
